protocol.name: wlr_foreign_toplevel_management_unstable_v1

interface.name: zwlr_foreign_toplevel_manager_v1
interface.description: The purpose of this protocol is to enable the creation of taskbars and docks by providing them with a list of opened applications and letting them request certain actions on them, like maximizing.
